name: a-meet
description: A-Meet — a Google Meet clone (MERN + Socket.io + mediasoup SFU)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:client
scripts.coverage: npm run coverage:server && npm run coverage:client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:shared && npm run typecheck:server && npm run typecheck:client
scripts.lint: npm run lint:server && npm run lint:client
scripts.audit: npm run audit:server && npm run audit:client
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run audit && npm run typecheck && npm run coverage && npm run build:client && npm run test:e2e
